summary: Set owner to the slugified contributor name (kevin-magnan) distinct from printer (the GitHub handle kjmagnan1s), and corrected auth_key_url from the spec-derived MDN Authorization-header doc to the real Apify token page (console.apify.com/account#/integrations). Also corrected two novel_features command paths to match the shipped command tree (search -> search items, schedule apply -> schedules apply).
rationale: The generator set owner == printer and pulled auth_key_url from the security scheme's description text; both are corrected to satisfy attribution conventions and give users a working token URL.
